प्राण — Life Force

The first
breath of
a home.

A door is not merely architecture. It is the quality of what moves through an opening — the difference between a space that feels alive and one that merely exists.

Discover

Our Philosophy

Prana is a
Sanskrit word.

It means life force. Breath. The vital energy that flows through living things and the spaces they inhabit.

In ancient Indian philosophy, prana is not just air — it is the quality of what moves through an opening. We chose this word deliberately. Not for decoration. Because it describes exactly what a great door does.

प्राण
प्राण / prāṇa
Life force · Breath · Vital energy
The animating principle of all living things

Obsessive Detail

Every millimetre
considered.

From the precision of a pivot bearing to the weight of a bronze handle — every element is chosen for how it makes you feel as much as how it performs.

How We Work

Bespoke by
nature.

01

Design
Consultation

We begin with space — your architecture, your light, your life. Every Prana door is designed from the inside out, fitting precisely into the world it will inhabit.

02

Material
Selection

Bronze or black. Reeded glass or clear. Steel that ages with grace or aluminium that endures. We source materials with the same intention you will live with them.

03

Precision
Manufacture

Every door is made to order. Tolerances measured in fractions of a millimetre. Mechanisms tested thousands of times before they reach your home.

04

White Glove
Installation

Our installation teams are trained to the same standard as our makers. A perfect door, installed perfectly — so that first breath is exactly what it should be.
